query:
INSERT INTO "ob-poc".cbu_ssi (
            cbu_id, ssi_name, ssi_type,
            safekeeping_account, safekeeping_bic,
            pset_bic, status, effective_date
        )
        VALUES ($1, 'Pending SSI', 'SECURITIES',
                'SAFE-002', 'BABOROCP',
                'DTCYUS33', 'PENDING', CURRENT_DATE)
        RETURNING ssi_id
